cards.name: 9 of Cups
cards.interpretation: wishes coming true, contentment, satisfaction, success, achievements, recognition, pleasure

cards.name: 8 of Swords
cards.interpretation: trapped, restricted, victimised, paralysed, helpless, powerless, imprisonment

cards.name: Knight of Swords, reversed
cards.interpretation: rude, tactless, forceful, bully, aggressive, vicious, ruthless, arrogant
